CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF BEN JIANG YAO AND AGAINST ELENA LAUCHUNG IN THE AMOUNT OF $309.63 PRINCIPAL AND $75 COSTS FOR A TOTAL OF $384.63. TERMS/OTHER ORDERS: APPELLANT LAUCHUNG TO PAY $309.63 TO RESPONDENT FOR UTILITIES FROM JAN. 1, 2020, TO MAR. 1, 2020. RESPONDENT MAY SEEK PAYMENT OF UTILITIES FROM MAR. 1, 2020 TO JAN 31, 2021 AFTER COVID MORATORIUM EXPIRES. SEE CCP SECTIONS 116.223 AND 1179.02. SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Set For Trial On Jan-20-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 606

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Continued To Jan-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant/Appellant Elena Lauchung appeared.
Defendant/Cross-Complainant/Respondent Ben Jiang Yao appeared, assisted by Cantonese interpreter Rebecca Chau.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Parties and Peter Yao, witness for Ben Jiang Yao, sworn.
Deputy D. Johnson present.
Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant/Appellant Elena Lauchung testified on her own behalf.
Defendant/Cross-Complainant/Respondent Ben Jiang Yao testified on his own behalf.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Defendant/Cross-Complainant/Respondent Group Exhibit - Rental agreement, water bills, PG&E bills.
Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant/Appellant Group Exhibit - Documents and cell phone photographs and videos.
Plaintiff's and Defendant's exhibits returned to the submitting parties by the Court.
The matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (606)
